content_fingerprint: llama cpp release b8927 optimizes q4 0 matrix multiplication for intel arc 770 the llama cpp project shipped a new release on april 25 2026 adding sycl based performance optimizations for intel arc 770 gpus alongside expanded build support for windows cuda 12 4 the ggml org llama cpp project published release b8927 on april 25 2026 introducing a targeted optimization to the q4 0 quantized matrix multiplication routine tailored for intel arc 770 hardware via the sycl backend the change tied to pull request 22291 also adds dedicated helper scripts for windows environments and updates documentati
